title: cyathea aurea
intro: Cyathea aurea, commonly known as the golden fern or yellow sally fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia and New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyathea aurea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as providing antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, poultices, and salves, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
